form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 0.8 lengths second at this track but did record a convincing 22.60 over the 400m journey. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 5th over 395m at Murray Bridge beaten 11 lengths (22.86) behind Stormy Day in a Invitation on February 20. Last run is a strong form reference. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recently finished 5th over 395m at Murray Bridge beaten 11 lengths (22.86) behind Stormy Day in a Invitation on February 20. Last run is a strong form reference. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 4th over 455m at Murray Bridge beaten 6 lengths (26.13) behind Take The Steps in a Grade 5 on March 27. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame six times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 4th over 455m at Murray Bridge beaten 6 lengths (26.13) behind Take The Steps in a Grade 5 on March 27. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame six times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (31.42) at Broken Hill in a NG, finishing sixth and beaten 11 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (31.42) at Broken Hill in a NG, finishing sixth and beaten 11 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Midway through the first turn was forced wide, was hampered and lost ground.
Hampered by contact in the first turn.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 342m at Angle Park in a handy (19.84), beating Aston Biden. Will find this a bit tougher, not likely to feature on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 342m at Angle Park in a handy (19.84), beating Aston Biden. Will find this a bit tougher, not likely to feature on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted running rail turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Showed strong early pace and stuck on well despite finishing out of the placings when fourth over 400m this track in 22.82. Has a solid record from this box, including three wins. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (17.12) over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight. Jumps from the outside. Looks to have the job ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Raced wide home straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.40) when fifth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and six minors. Tough field and looking to others this time.
